# Personal Portfolio Project

This is a modern personal portfolio website showcasing projects, skills, and contact information.

## Project Type
- **Type**: Static Website
- **Languages**: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+)
- **Features**: 
  - Responsive design
  - Dark/Light mode toggle
  - Smooth animations
  - Interactive project showcase
  - Skills section with visual elements
  - Contact form
  - About section

## Development Guidelines
- Use semantic HTML5
- Follow modern CSS practices (Grid, Flexbox)
- Use vanilla JavaScript for interactivity
- Ensure mobile-first responsive design
- Optimize for performance and accessibility

## Project Structure
- `index.html` - Main HTML file
- `styles.css` - Styling and animations
- `script.js` - Interactive functionality
- `assets/` - Images and media files (if needed)

## Deployment
This portfolio can be deployed to:
- GitHub Pages
- Netlify
- Vercel
- Any static hosting service
